assembly_context.name: 27inch_Monitor_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 27英寸显示器装配体，包含屏幕面板、两段式可调节立柱、圆形底座及VESA安装背板。支持左右旋转配合，立柱模拟上下调节后的固定状态。

global_coordinate_system.y_direction: Right side of Monitor (from front view)

design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for API calls.
Use XY plane as horizontal base for all parts unless specified.
Ensure concentricity for all cylindrical connections.
Screen panel is fixed relative to bracket; rotation is simulated by bracket orientation.

instances.name: Inner Tube Instance
instances.placement_notes: Inserted into outer tube. Extended 50mm above outer tube top.

part.name: Stand Column Inner Tube
part.function: Inner sliding tube that extends from the outer tube.
part.shape: Solid cylinder or thick-walled tube. Outer diameter 30mm. Height 150mm.

faces.name: inner_tube_bottom_face
faces.purpose: Internal stop or reference inside outer tube.

axes.name: inner_tube_center_axis
axes.purpose: Concentric axis for mating with outer tube and bracket.

assembly_relation_notes: Extended 50mm above Outer Tube Top Face (Total height from base = 200 + 50 = 250mm for top face).
standalone_modeling_instructions: Sketch circle diameter 30mm on XY plane centered at origin.
